backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for a university portal implementing data types and CRUD operations for admissions, courses, fees, payments, hostels, results, and announcements. Includes role-based access control (admin, student, staff, parent) with authorization helpers and Stripe payment integration.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping a single feature (authorization error toasts/inline messages on admin panel pages) to its relevant frontend files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and recent changes such as auth error banners, currency formatting fixes, and routing corrections.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA titled 'University of Africa Portal', mounting the app at the #root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component that defines all TanStack Router routes (public, student, parent, staff, admin, and payment pages) and wraps the app with ThemeProvider and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: A modal dialog that collects new user profile information (name, role, ID number, email) and saves it to the backend using the `useSaveCallerUserProfile` hook. It is non-dismissible and shown when an authenticated user has no existing profile.
frontend/src/components/auth/RoleGuard.t: A route guard component that restricts access to children based on the authenticated user's role, showing login prompts, loading spinners, or access-denied messages as appropriate.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: A site-wide footer component displaying the university branding, quick navigation links, portal links, and contact information.
frontend/src/components/layout/Layout.ts: The root layout component that wraps all pages with the Navigation bar and conditionally renders the ProfileSetupModal when an authenticated user has no profile.
frontend/src/components/layout/Navigatio: A sticky top navigation bar that renders role-specific links (student, admin, staff, parent), handles login/logout via Internet Identity, and shows a user profile dropdown menu.
frontend/src/components/payments/StripeS: An admin UI card that prompts Stripe configuration when it is not yet set up, allowing input of a secret key and allowed countries to enable student online payments.
frontend/src/components/RoleGuard.tsx: React component that protects routes by checking authentication state and the caller's user profile role, rendering loading spinners, a login prompt, or an unauthorized message as appropriate before rendering children.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, and invalidates all dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state and persisting identity via DFINITY's AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for backend canister interactions including user profile management, admission applications, and shopping items, with error extraction utilities.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Tailwind CSS and Google Fonts, defining a deep navy and gold academic color theme with CSS custom properties for light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
Admin dashboard showing summary stats (students, courses, fee types, pending admissions) with a sidebar navigation and service cards linking to all admin management sections.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdmissionsManag: Admin page for reviewing admission applications with search/filter controls and admit/reject actions, displaying authorization errors and status badges per application.
frontend/src/pages/admin/FeeManagementPa: Admin page for managing fee types, providing a form to add new fee types (name, amount, programme, session) and a table listing existing ones with Naira formatting.
frontend/src/pages/admin/HostelManagemen: Admin page for viewing and managing hostel applications, with search/filter controls and approve/reject actions that update application status via mutation.
frontend/src/pages/admin/MessagingPage.t: Admin page for composing and sending announcements to targeted roles (students, staff, etc.), with a local history of sent messages displayed below the form.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ProgrammeManage: Admin page for adding and listing academic courses, with a form accepting course code, name, semester, and programme fields.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ResultsManageme: Admin page for posting student results by selecting a student, course, semester, grade, and score, and displaying all existing results in a table.
frontend/src/pages/admin/StaffManagement: Admin page that fetches all user profiles and displays staff members in a table, wrapped in a role-guarded layout with an admin sidebar for navigation.
frontend/src/pages/admin/StudentManageme: Admin page for registering new students and listing existing ones with search/filter functionality, including authorization error handling.
Page component allowing users to check their admission status by JAMB registration number or full name, displaying approved/rejected/pending results.
frontend/src/pages/AdmissionsPage.tsx: Informational admissions landing page showing application steps, important dates, and links to apply or check admission status.
frontend/src/pages/ApplicationFormPage.t: Multi-step university admission application form (personal info, JAMB details, O'Level results, programme choice, documents) that submits data via a mutation hook and shows a success state with the generated application ID.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Public landing page displaying university hero banner, stats, available programmes, and admission notices, with role-aware dashboard navigation for authenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/parent/ParentDashboar: Parent portal dashboard that allows parents to link a student by ID and view that student's academic results grouped by semester with GPA calculations.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailurePage.ts: Simple static page shown when a payment is cancelled, informing the user no charges were made and providing links back to the fee statement or student dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccessPage.ts: Payment confirmation page that verifies a Stripe session ID from the URL, records the payment in the backend, and displays success, loading, or error states accordingly.
Staff portal dashboard displaying summary stats for students, courses, and results, with a sidebar for navigation and loading/error states.
frontend/src/pages/student/CourseRegistr: Student course registration page that lists available courses grouped by semester with search filtering and local toggle-based registration state.
frontend/src/pages/student/FeeStatementP: Displays a student's fee statement with summary cards for total paid and outstanding balance, a fee schedule table with pay-now buttons that initiate Stripe checkout sessions, and a payment history table.
frontend/src/pages/student/HostelApplica: Allows students to submit a hostel accommodation application by selecting room type and session, and displays the status (pending/approved/rejected) of any existing application.
frontend/src/pages/student/PaymentHistor: Shows a student's full payment transaction history in a table with a total-paid summary card, and links to individual receipts for each payment.
frontend/src/pages/student/ReceiptPage.t: Renders a printable official payment receipt for a specific payment ID, displaying student profile details, payment metadata, and a confirmation indicator.
frontend/src/pages/student/ResultsPage.t: Displays a student's academic results grouped by semester with grade badges and average scores, alongside a sidebar navigation for the student portal.
frontend/src/pages/student/StudentDashbo: Student dashboard page showing profile info, enrolled courses, results, and unpaid fees with a sidebar for navigation. Includes loading skeletons, error state with retry, and service card grid linking to student sub-pages.
frontend/src/pages/student/TranscriptPag: Transcript page that fetches student results and courses, groups them by semester, calculates GPA, and renders a printable academic transcript with student info and per-semester grade tables.
frontend/src/utils/currency.ts: Utility module providing formatNaira and formatNairaFromBackend helpers that format numeric or bigint amounts as Nigerian Naira strings using Intl.NumberFormat.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens (navy, gold, success, sidebar, chart), border radii, box shadows, and accordion animations, plus typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot (version 13) describing the university portal's architecture, existing features, and known issues such as broken course addition, admin authorization failures, and profile loading problems.
